positive: A seamless, highly stylized illustration of intertwined cosmic flora and celestial bodies. The central focus features bioluminescent, stylized leaves wrapping around a cluster of nebula dust and crescent moons. The color palette is dominated by deep indigo, ethereal teal, vibrant lavender, and pops of iridescent gold. Composition must be perfectly symmetrical and centered, suitable for repeating print patterns on apparel. Utilize strong, clean outlines (line-art aesthetic) against a dark, contrasting background. The style should be a blend of Art Nouveau and scientific diagram illustration, rendered with perfect crispness, high detail, and graphic impact. Minimalist, elegant, and magical.
